name: visual-canvas
description: Single-entry Codex-native visual report and HTML artifact workflow.

interface.shortDescription: Generate polished visual reports and reusable HTML artifacts.
interface.longDescription: Visual Canvas provides one public router skill for producing compact project-backed visual HTML artifacts with diagrams, charts, SVG, optional generated images, persistent profiles, and reusable HTML output policy guidance.
defaultPrompt: Use $visual-canvas to make a visual report.
Use $visual-canvas to review this branch visually.
Use $visual-canvas to apply HTML output policy.
